free_text: Deuteron beam (effective energy of 125 keV, beam
current of 20 mA) on T-Ti target (0.9 mg/cm2 thick).
energy resolution of 3 keV at 1.33 MeV.
Disks (20 mm in diam.) placed at center of beam stop
on the T-Ti target with distances between 10 cm.
Mo sample was sandwiched between two Nb foils, and the
others were between two Al foils.
The values of the partial uncertainties are not in
the source articles, and are assumed to be received
from the authors at CNDC in 1999.
On. Bib updated. Partial errors in COMMON.
